human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for flight-operations-support-specific service resolution behavior, movement and turnaround controls, chain-of-custody handling, dispatch-release evidence boundaries, customs and security escalation, maintenance and safety refusal rules, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to flight operations support resolution, stakeholder communication, movement and turnaround dependency packaging, custody exceptions, documentation gaps, irregular-operations escalation, and adjacent-owner handoff rather than generic customer service or dispatch.

Authority sources cover FAA and eCFR operational control, dispatching authority, dispatch release contents, load manifest records, aircraft dispatcher qualification, NOTAM procedures, SMS safety escalation, TSA aircraft operator security, CBP air cargo documentation, and IATA baggage and ground operations references.

Evaluation scenarios cover normal in-scope execution, missing details, policy exception requests, handoff to maintenance, chain-of-custody breaks, route and schedule disruption, dispatch/customs/safety authority pressure, aviation terminology normalization, unsupported workaround refusal, low-confidence handling, conflicting-policy escalation, and tenant adaptation controls.

The package is organized under catalog/naics-overlays/air-transportation-and-airports/flight-operations-support-specialist/ so it remains distinct from adjacent dispatch, customs/compliance, maintenance, warehouse, airport operations, ground handling, customer operations, crew operations, and aviation safety lanes.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in the local package review.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation/results.json and readiness/evidence.json as required by the issue.
The package does not claim a retained implementation; runtime_strategy remains specification-based.

notes: This package is suitable as a validated flight operations support specialist for resolution notes, stakeholder communication, movement and turnaround summaries, custody exception notes, irregular-operations escalation, and evidence-backed handoffs.
Runtime remains specification-based until a retained implementation is promoted separately.
